Story.label: About ANIMA 119
Story.headline: Legacy of fermented medicine
Story.description1: ANIMA 119 was born from over 35 years of research by Dr. Uh Bong-woo at the Korea Fermented Herbal Medicine Research Institute. Produced using the proprietary 4th fermentation technology and 3-stage low-temperature separation method - the only one of its kind in the world.
Story.description2: Distributed in Vietnam by ZenX Holdings JSC, ANIMA 119 delivers a comprehensive health solution built on the foundation of traditional medicine combined with modern biotechnology.

Featured.label: Product
Featured.headline: ANIMA 119
Featured.description: Food supplements from Korean fermented Oriental medicine - Produced by Insung Pharm, FSSC 22000 and GMP certified.

Process.label: Technology
Process.headline: 4th Fermentation Process
Process.description: Proprietary technology developed by the Korea Fermented Herbal Medicine Research Institute.
Process.step1Desc: 119 Oriental medicine herbs carefully selected following Dr. Uh Bong-woo's methodology.
Process.step2Desc: Applying 4-stage fermentation technology with Oriental medicine microorganisms for enhanced bioavailability.
Process.step3Desc: 3-stage low-temperature separation method with rigorous GMP quality control.

Benefits.item1Desc: Promotes healthy blood circulation, supports cardiovascular health.
Benefits.item2Desc: Supports bone and spine health, reduces aches, improves mobility.
Benefits.item3Desc: Restores body energy, reduces fatigue, strengthens natural immunity.
Benefits.item4Desc: Supports liver detoxification, protects and restores liver function naturally.

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.content: Welcome to ANIMA 119. By accessing and using the website anima119.com, you agree to comply with the terms and conditions stated in this document.

company.title: 2. Company Information
company.name: ZenX Holdings JSC
company.founded: Official distributor of ANIMA 119 in Vietnam
company.address: Address: 15/11 Duy Tan, Cau Giay Ward, Hanoi

products.title: 3. Products and Services
products.content: ANIMA 119 provides food supplements from Korean fermented Oriental medicine. All products are manufactured by Insung Pharm according to FSSC 22000 and GMP standards with clear origin.

orders.title: 4. Orders and Payment
items: Orders are confirmed after successful payment
Shipping fees are calculated separately based on delivery address

delivery.title: 5. Delivery
delivery.content: Orders will be delivered within 2-5 business days depending on location. Free shipping for orders from 500,000d.

returns.title: 6. Returns and Refunds
returns.content: Customers can return products within 7 days from delivery date, provided the product is still sealed and unused. See details on the Return Policy page.

ip.title: 7. Intellectual Property
ip.content: All content on anima119.com including logo, images, and text is property of ZenX Holdings JSC and protected by intellectual property law.

carriers.title: Shipping Partners
carriers.intro: We partner with reputable shipping companies:

tracking.title: Order Tracking
tracking.desc: After your order is shipped, you will receive an SMS or email notification with tracking number.

notes.title: Delivery Notes
items: Record video when unboxing as evidence if issues arise
Refuse delivery if external damage visible

highlight.title: Free returns within 7 days
highlight.desc: Applies to products with original seal, unused

conditions.title: Return Conditions
items: Return request within 7 days from delivery

evidence.gut: Gut microbiota enrichment: Beneficial microorganisms enhanced
evidence.rct: 11 Randomized Controlled Trials (2000-2011) confirming safety and efficacy
